panels.title: Per-stage latency waterfall (p95, last 1h)
panels.description: Browser→browser waterfall for the latency-budget blog post. Stages run in series: audio_capture_start → webspeech_final → ws_send → llm_ttft → tts_first_chunk → first_pcm (browser) → first_frame_rendered. Use the snapshot_panel.sh script to freeze a copy before/after each optimisation.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.95, {job="behavioral-dummy"} | json | event="turn_stage_timing" | llm_ttft_ms != "" | unwrap llm_ttft_ms [1h]) by ()

quantile_over_time(0.95, {job="behavioral-dummy"} | json | event="client_stage_timing" | webspeech_final_ms != "" | unwrap webspeech_final_ms [1h]) by ()

panels.title: Per-stage latency over time (p95)
panels.description: Stacked p95 trend for each waterfall stage. Use alongside panel 6 to see if a specific stage is regressing.
